/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/gadgetlib1_simple_test.dir/gadgetlib1/tests/gadgetlib1_test.cpp.o -o gadgetlib1_simple_test  libsnark.a ../depends/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest_main.a ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto ../depends/gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.a
